# Roadmap

## In Progress
- Album page showing all analyzations for the tracks
- Hosting Docker container on Render
- [Coverflow-esque](data:image/jpeg;base64,) album selection

## Planned
- Sort by saved albums (Coverflow implementation)
- Guitar tuning of each song

## Ideas / Maybe
- Liked songs implementation (infinite scroll, queueing, multi-threading)
- Full Screen visual guide with song info tied to Web Playback API in real-time
